gt_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(t2.overall_rating) AS REAL) / COUNT(t2.id) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.player_name = 'Aaron Doran'
pred_sql:
SELECT CAST(SUM(t2.overall_rating) AS REAL) / COUNT(t2.id) 
FROM Player AS t1 
JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id 
WHERE t1.player_name = 'Aaron Doran';
question: What is the average overall rating of the football player Aaron Doran?
